steps: Prepare digestion buffer 10 ml / tissue / 2~5 mice.

Weight Collagenase D (f.c. 1.5 U/ml) and Dispase II (f.c. 2.4 U/ml) in 50 ml tube. %s %s Collagenase D %s %s 7.5 U/tissue %s %s Dispase II %s %s 12 U/tissue %s %s Collagenase D Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #11088866001 Dispase II (neutral protease, grade II) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #4942078001
Add appropriate amount of PBS to dissolve. Sacrifice mice before dissolving. PBS Contributed by users
Shake in water bath at 37 ℃. Undetermined, less than 10 min
Sacrifice mice and take out adipose tissue, place on sterile 10 cm dish with PBS at room temperature (RT).
Activate digestion buffer by adding CaCl2 (f.c. 10 mM). Calcium chloride solution Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #21115-100ML
Remove residual PBS from the tissues by patting on Kimwipe.
Add 2 ml of activated digestion buffer to tissue in 10 cm dish.
Mince with scissors until approximately 1 mm pieace
Transfer to 50 ml tube by pipette.
Shake in water bath at 37 ℃ for 1 hour (gently shake by hand every 10 min). Undetermined 01:00:00 00:10:00, x6

Stop digestion by adding 5 ml of 0.5 % BSA in PBS + EDTA (autoMACS Rinsing Solution). Bovine Serum Albumin solution Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #A1595-50ML autoMACS Rinsing Solution Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-091-222
Spin 300 g for 5 min at room temperature (RT).
Remove the sup.
Suspend the pellet with 1 ml 0.5 % BSA in PBS + EDTA (autoMACS Rinsing Solution).
Place a cell strainer (100 μm diameter) over a new 50 ml tube and filter the cell suspension. Corning® 100µm Cell Strainer Corning Catalog #431752
Repeat step 13-16 with 40 μm diameter cell strainer. go to step #13 Corning® 40µm Cell Strainer Corning Catalog #431750
Spin 300 g for 5 min at RT.
Discard the supernatant completely.
Suspend the pellet with cold (4 ℃) 80μl of 0.5 % BSA in PBS + EDTA (autoMACS Rinsing Solution). From this step use cold (4 ℃) buffer. Undetermined
Add 20 μl (mix by gentle pipetting) of Non-Adipocyte Progenitor Depletion Cocktail, mouse. Adipose Tissue Progenitor Isolation Kit, mouse Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-106-639
Mix well and incubate for 15 min at 4 ℃ (protected from light). 00:15:00

During the incubation, place LS Column in the magnetic field of a MACS Separator and 15 ml tube under LS Column. MACS MultiStand Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-042-303 QuadroMACS Separator Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-090-976 MACS 15 mL Tube Rack Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-091-052 LS Columns Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-042-401

Prime column by adding 3 ml of 0.5 % BSA in PBS + EDTA (autoMACS Rinsing Solution). Avoid air bubbles, bubbles could block the column. Always wait until the column reservoir is empty before proceeding to the next step.
After 15 min incubation, add 400 ul of 0.5 % BSA in PBS + EDTA (autoMACS Rinsing Solution) and apply onto the column. Collect flow-through containing Lin- cells.
Wash column with 1 ml of 0.5 % BSA in PBS + EDTA (autoMACS Rinsing Solution) 2 times. Collect flow-through containing Lin- cells.
Spin 300 g for 5 min at RT.
Remove the supernatant.
Suspend cells in 100 ul of 1 % BSA in PBS + EDTA (autoMACS Rinsing Solution).
Add 2 ul of TruStain fcX Ab. (0.5 mg/ml) and mix. TruStain fcX™ (anti-mouse CD16/32) Antibody BioLegend Catalog #101319
Incubate 10 min on ice (Protect from light). 00:10:00
Add 900 ul of 1 % BSA in PBS + EDTA (autoMACS Rinsing Solution) and mix.
Spin 300 g for 5 min in 4 ℃.
Remove the supernatant.
Add 100 ul of Click-iT fixative (4 % paraformaldehyde in PBS) and mix. 4% paraformaldehyde/1XPBS solution Contributed by users
Incubate 15 min RT (Protect from light). 00:15:00
Add 900 ul of 1 % BSA in PBS + EDTA (autoMACS Rinsing Solution) and mix.
Spin 300 g for 5 min RT. Prepare permeabilization buffer (0.3 % Triton X-100 Dilute in 'RT (25℃)' 1 % BSA in PBS + EDTA)
Remove the supernatant.
Add 100 ul of permeabilization buffer and mix.
Incubate 15 min RT (Protected from light). 00:15:00
Add labeled Mmp3 Ab. (1:200) and mix. MMP3 Monoclonal Antibody (4F10) Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher Catalog #MA5-17123
Incubate 10 min on ice (Protected from light). 00:10:00
Add 900 ul of permeabilization buffer and mix.
Spin 300 g for 5 min 4 ℃.
Remove the supernatant.

Suspend in 500 ul of permeabilization buffer and load on 5 ml Polystyrene Round-Bottom Tube with Cell-strainer Cap. Falcon® 5 mL Round Bottom Polystyrene Test Tube, with Cell Strainer Snap Cap Corning Catalog #352235
Proceed to sort by BD FACSAria II.
creator: Aoi Satoh
